SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
Interface MediaMixer

All Superinterfaces:
AllocationEventNotifier, Joinable, JoinableContainer, JoinEventNotifier, MediaEventNotifier<MixerEvent>, MediaObject, ResourceContainer, java.io.Serializable
public interface MediaMixer
extends JoinableContainer, ResourceContainer, MediaEventNotifier<MixerEvent>

This class is required when the application needs to mix (or add, or sum) multiple media streams into a single one. Other Joinable media objects, like MediaGroups and NetworkConnections, can be joined/unjoined to a MediaMixer. The MediaMixer computes the sum of all ingressing streams, and sends it out to every joined object.
On the audio stream, the contribution of a given object is actually not re-sent to this particular object (this would add a disturbing echo).
A MediaMixer is the base for a conference service. Its usage extends to many other cases, including extended bridge, coaching, background music, etc...
A MediaMixer can send events to the application.

Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable

Field Summary
static Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO
          This Configuration supports simple audio mixing.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_EVENTS
          This Configuration supports audio mixing, plus the events related to the active talkers.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_VIDEO
          This Configuration support mixing of audio and video.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING
          This Configuration supports the features of AUDIO_VIDEO, plus a VideoRenderer.
static Parameter ENABLED_EVENTS
          An array of Mixer EventType's, indicating which events are generated and delivered to the application.
static Parameter MAX_ACTIVE_INPUTS
          Only this number of (loudest talking) inputs (participants) are included in the mix.
static Parameter MAX_PORTS
          Maximum number of media objects (Joinable's) that can be joined to the Mixer.

Field Detail

AUDIO

static final Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO
This Configuration supports simple audio mixing.

This Configuration must support (at least) the Parameter MAX_PORTS.

AUDIO_EVENTS

static final Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_EVENTS
This Configuration supports audio mixing, plus the events related to the active talkers.

This Configuration must support the features of the Configuration AUDIO, plus (at least) the EventType MixerEvent.ACTIVE_INPUTS_CHANGED.

AUDIO_VIDEO

static final Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_VIDEO
This Configuration support mixing of audio and video.
It must support also the features of the Configuration AUDIO_EVENTS.

AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING

static final Configuration<MediaMixer> AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING
This Configuration supports the features of AUDIO_VIDEO, plus a VideoRenderer.

MAX_PORTS

static final Parameter MAX_PORTS
Maximum number of media objects (Joinable's) that can be joined to the Mixer.
Value is a positive Integer.
The default is 5. The maximum value is depending only on the CPU power available.

MAX_ACTIVE_INPUTS

static final Parameter MAX_ACTIVE_INPUTS
Only this number of (loudest talking) inputs (participants) are included in the mix.
Value is a positive Integer.

ENABLED_EVENTS

static final Parameter ENABLED_EVENTS
An array of Mixer EventType's, indicating which events are generated and delivered to the application. If a given EventType is not enabled, then no processing is expended to generate or distribute that kind of event.

Valid values: MixerEvent.MOST_ACTIVE_INPUT_CHANGED
Default value = [empty].

Method Detail

createMixerAdapter

MixerAdapter createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig)
                                throws MsControlException
Create a MixerAdapter.

Parameters:
predefinedConfig - Defines the set of resources in the MixerAdapter, and their arrangement.
See MixerAdapter for the list of predefined Configurations.
Returns:
a MixerAdapter
Throws:
MsControlException

createMixerAdapter

MixerAdapter createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig,
                                Parameters params)
                                throws MsControlException
Create a MixerAdapter.

Parameters:
predefinedConfig - Defines the set of resources in the MixerAdapter, and their arrangement.
See MixerAdapter for the list of predefined Configurations.
params - customization parameters, like MediaObject.MEDIAOBJECT_ID.
Returns:
a MixerAdapter
Throws:
MsControlException

createMixerAdapter

MixerAdapter createMixerAdapter(MediaConfig config,
                                Parameters params)
                                throws MsControlException
Create a MixerAdapter.

Parameters:
config - Defines the set of resources in the MixerAdapter, and their arrangement.
This MediaConfig may not be predefined. See MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(Configuration) and MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(java.io.Reader) to obtain a MediaConfig.
params - customization parameters, like MediaObject.MEDIAOBJECT_ID.
Returns:
a MixerAdapter
Throws:
MsControlException
